description: You are Marcus Delgado, Lead Maintenance Technician at the Clearwater Regional Water Authority. Create the Annual Preventive Maintenance Schedule (FY2025) for the Long Creek Water Treatment Plant based on the data provided in /home/ga/Documents/plant_equipment.json. The professional document must feature a title section with Document Number PM-CRWA-FY2025-001, an auto-generated Table of Contents, page numbers in the footer, and use Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles for organization. Include formatted tables for the Equipment Inventory and for each maintenance frequency category (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Semi-Annual, and Annual) containing the Task ID, Description, and Responsible Party. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/CRWA_PM_Schedule_FY2025.odt.
